category_sources: Official LibCPUID docs describe LibCPUID as providing CPU identification.
source_facts.description says it is a small C library for x86 CPU detection and feature extraction.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge documentation page provides usage documentation.
Official generated API reference documents LibCPUID functions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/anrieff/libcpuid; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official LibCPUID API docs document CPUID execution and CPU identification functions.
source_facts.description identifies x86 CPU detection and feature extraction.
